source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open HooliChat, the iMessage-like messaging app at http://localhost:3004 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Open your direct-message conversation with Pam Beesly and send her exactly this message: "Hi Pam, please print the Penny Marlin onboarding packet#PMX7 before the 3pm meeting."
